seoTitle: Moonta Mines vs Moorlands — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Moonta Mines and Moorlands. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Moonta Mines vs Moorlands: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moonta Mines and Moorlands.
heading: Moonta Mines vs Moorlands — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moonta Mines, South Australia and Moorlands, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moonta Mines has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Moorlands (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moonta Mines or Moorlands safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moonta Mines has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Moorlands scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moonta Mines scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Moorlands scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moonta Mines or Moorlands?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moonta Mines has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
